description: Add an unread messages section to all 3 role dashboards (gestionnaire, locataire, prestataire) showing unread intervention conversation threads. Compact list rows between stats and interventions, SSR-fetched, with smooth fade-out on mark-as-read. Hidden when no unread messages.

userStories.title: Repository: getUnreadThreadsForDashboard()
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a repository method that returns unread conversation threads with intervention details, so the dashboard can display them without N+1 queries.
acceptanceCriteria: New method getUnreadThreadsForDashboard(userId) in conversation-repository.ts
Returns UnreadThread[] with: threadId, threadType, interventionId, interventionTitle, interventionReference, unreadCount, lastMessage (content, senderName, createdAt)
Uses 3-4 batch queries (no N+1) following existing getUnreadCount pattern
Sorted by lastMessage.createdAt DESC
Returns totalCount for pagination awareness
Lint passes
userStories.notes: 5 batch queries: participations → timestamps → messages → interventions → users. UnreadThread type exported.

userStories.title: Server Action: markAllThreadsAsReadAction()
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark all my conversation threads as read in one click, so I don't have to dismiss them one by one.
acceptanceCriteria: New server action markAllThreadsAsReadAction() in conversation-actions.ts
Marks all threads where user is participant as read (updates last_read_message_id to latest message)
Returns { success: true } or { success: false, error }
Uses getServerActionAuthContextOrNull pattern
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Batch update pattern: get latest msg per thread → Promise.all updates. Revalidates all 3 dashboard paths.

userStories.title: UI Component: UnreadMessagesSection
userStories.description: As a user, I want a compact unread messages section on my dashboard showing which intervention threads have unread messages, so I can quickly see and respond to new messages.
acceptanceCriteria: New component components/dashboards/shared/unread-messages-section.tsx
Shows max 5 thread rows with: blue dot, intervention title+ref, thread type chip (colored), time ago, last message preview, action buttons (mark read + go to intervention)
Header with MessageSquare icon + 'Messages non lus' + count badge + 'Tout marquer comme lu' button
'Voir tous' link when totalCount > 5
Hidden when 0 threads (no render at all)
Smooth fade-out animation on mark-as-read (150ms fade + 150ms collapse)
Responsive: stacked on mobile, icon-only buttons
Thread type chips use same color scheme as ConversationSelector
Navigation URL: /${role}/interventions/${interventionId}?tab=conversations&thread=${threadType}
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Dual-state animation (fadingIds + dismissedIds). Separate mobile/desktop layouts. Exported via shared/index.ts.

userStories.title: Deep-link: ?tab=conversations&thread= support
userStories.description: As a user clicking 'go to intervention' from the dashboard, I want to land directly on the Conversations tab with the right thread selected, so I can read the message immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Gestionnaire intervention-detail-client reads searchParams.tab and searchParams.thread on mount
Sets activeTab from searchParams.tab if valid (defaults to 'general')
Sets selectedThreadType from searchParams.thread if valid
Same logic for locataire and prestataire intervention detail pages
Lint passes
userStories.notes: 3 files modified. initialTab/initialThread from searchParams. Gestionnaire uses selectedThreadType, locataire/prestataire use defaultThreadType.

userStories.title: Gestionnaire dashboard: integrate UnreadMessagesSection
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see unread messages on my dashboard between stats and interventions, so I can quickly respond to conversations.
acceptanceCriteria: SSR fetch unread threads in gestionnaire dashboard page.tsx
Pass unreadThreads + totalCount as props to ManagerDashboardV2
Render UnreadMessagesSection between stats cards and interventions navigator
Gestionnaire sees all 5 thread types
Section hidden when no unread threads
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Fetch in async-dashboard-content.tsx via ConversationRepository. Separate try/catch for fault tolerance.

userStories.title: Locataire dashboard: integrate UnreadMessagesSection
userStories.description: As a locataire, I want to see unread messages on my dashboard, so I can stay informed about my intervention requests.
acceptanceCriteria: SSR fetch unread threads in locataire dashboard page.tsx
Pass unreadThreads as props to locataire dashboard component
Render UnreadMessagesSection after property section
Locataire sees only: group, tenants_group, tenant_to_managers
Section hidden when no unread threads
Lint passes
userStories.notes: 3-layer prop drilling: page.tsx → LocataireDashboard → LocataireDashboardHybrid. UnreadThread type used (no any[]).

userStories.title: Prestataire dashboard: integrate UnreadMessagesSection
userStories.description: As a prestataire, I want to see unread messages on my dashboard above my interventions, so I can respond to client conversations quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: SSR fetch unread threads in prestataire dashboard page.tsx
Pass unreadThreads as props to ProviderDashboardV2
Render UnreadMessagesSection above InterventionsNavigator
Prestataire sees only: group, providers_group, provider_to_managers
Section hidden when no unread threads
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Simplest integration — ProviderDashboardV2 renders section above InterventionsNavigator. UnreadThread type used.
